title: NYC Upper West Side stabbing: Zohran Mamdani reveals disturbing details of 'hateful' attack
summary_full: New York City police are investigating two recent stabbings on Manhattan's Upper West Side.  Witnesses reported the suspect shouted "Allahu Akbar" during both assaults on victims.  Authorities have arrested 51-year-old Raul Morales in connection with these separate incidents.  Investigators are examining mental health factors and whether these attacks qualify as hate crimes.
